description: Case diameter: 41 mmCase thickness: 11 mmDial shape: RoundSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack fibre strap with an embossed design and a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with brand logo at the 1 hour mark and branding at the 7 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it during slight rains
